title: Roasted Sea Bass with Indian Spices
description: Flaky sea bass roasted to perfection with a blend of Indian spices, served with a side of roasted vegetables.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and grease with oil.
Place sea bass fillets on the baking sheet.
In a small bowl, mix together cumin powder, coriander powder, and garlic powder.
Sprinkle the spice mixture evenly over the sea bass fillets.
Roast in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes or until cooked through.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve with lemon wedges.
Serve with roasted vegetables of your choice.
